name: cascade-video-diffusion

paperTitle: CascadeV - Video Diffusion with Progressive Noise Schedule
content:
## CascadeV

### Core Concept

Generate high-quality video using cascaded diffusion with carefully tuned noise schedules

### Implementation

Key implementation aspects:
1. Data preparation and preprocessing
2. Model architecture design
3. Training procedure
4. Evaluation and validation

This skill enables Generate high-quality video using cascaded diffusion with carefully tuned noise schedules.

### When to Use

- Problem domain matches technique scope
- Required computational resources available
- Evaluation criteria well-defined

### When NOT to Use

- Limited data availability
- Tight latency requirements
- Domain significantly different
